name: Zesty Lemon Custard Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 stick unsalted butter, at room temperature
1 tbsp grated lemon peel (from 1 large lemon)
recipeInstructions:
Cookie Pastry:
1. Beat the butter and sugar together until light and fluffy, about 2 minutes.
2. Add the egg and flour, mixing until a smooth dough forms.
3. Shape the dough into a ball and flatten it into a disc.
4. Wrap in plastic wrap and refrigerate until chilled.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Roll or press the dough evenly over the bottom and up the sides of a 9-inch pie pan.
7. Melt the butter in the microwave; set aside.
8. Whisk the eggs and sugar together until blended.
9. Add the lemon peel and slowly stir in the melted butter and lemon juice until incorporated.
10. Pour into the crust.
11. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes, or until the top of the custard is lightly browned. It will not test clean and may look underdone, but it will set as it cools.
12. When cool, refrigerate.
13. Before serving, sprinkle powdered sugar on top.
